polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly ONE paragraph, start with 'Bullish:', 'Bearish:', or 'Mixed:' followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words.

We need to interpret sentiment: Ethereum dip to $1,500 by Dec 2026: Yes 42% (so less than half think it will dip). Bitcoin reach $67,500 in July: Yes 77% (strong bullish). Bitcoin reach $67,000 on July 21: Yes 6% (low). Bitcoin reach $75,000 in July: Yes 4% (low). Bitcoin reach $70,000 in July: Yes 35% (moderate). Bitcoin reach $72,500 in July: Yes 13% (low). So overall: high confidence for $67.5k, moderate for $70k, low for higher targets. Ethereum dip less likely than not? Actually 42% yes, 58% no. So sentiment mixed but leaning bullish for Bitcoin near-term, uncertain for Ethereum long term. So we can say Mixed: because Bitcoin near-term bullish but higher targets low confidence, Ethereum dip uncertain.

We need to mention numbers and names where available. Include percentages and volumes maybe. Must be max 80 words. One paragraph.
